display_information.name: Beckett Staging
display_information.description: Neurodivergent workplace communication coaching in Slack.

agent_view.agent_description: Beckett is a neurodivergent workplace communication coach that helps you decode messages, draft clearer replies, rewrite responses, and prep or practice difficult conversations.

suggested_prompts.title: Decode a Message
suggested_prompts.message: /beckett decode help me understand this message without over-reading it.

suggested_prompts.title: Respond to a Message
suggested_prompts.message: /beckett respond help me draft a clear response to this conversation.

suggested_prompts.title: Rewrite a Message
suggested_prompts.message: /beckett rewrite help me make this response clearer and kinder.

suggested_prompts.title: Prep / Practice
suggested_prompts.message: /beckett prep help me prepare for a difficult conversation.

slash_commands.description: Respond, rewrite, decode, prep, or practice workplace conversations.

shortcuts.name: Ask Beckett
shortcuts.description: Get private coaching on this Slack message or thread.
